message: Node started: Develop a Python script that implements a greedy algorithm to solve the problem. The algorithm should: 1. Read the input N, M, K, the initial board, and the M stamps. 2. Iteratively select the stamp and position (i, j) that provides the maximum increase to the total sum of the board entries when added modulo 998244353. 3. Ensure that the placement (i, j) allows the 3x3 stamp to stay within the 9x9 board boundaries. 4. Stop when no more placements can increase the sum or when K placements are reached. 5. Output the number of placements L and then each placement as m i j.
